title: [CI:DOCS]First pass at release process
body: Import the release process docs from a private google-doc for accessibility and ease of maintenance.

comments.body:
Oh, my bad.  This is no where near ready for review :frowning: Sorry if I wasted anybody's time.

> I'd like a s/micro/patch as it's a established term in semver. Other than that LGTM

I agree, "patch" is much more meaningful than "micro".

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL draft, or at least glace through it.  Sorry it's **HUGE** and it's **HAIRY** (with some bonus monster drool).  I'm sure it's not perfect and there are mistakes and missing links.  I'd appreciate feedback on any glaring mistakes/omissions - Then I'll make another pass or three over it and refine further as required.  Thanks :grin:

> @cevich, could you add that major releases require to bump the go module in go.mod?
> Let's get this PR in.

Sure.  I was leaving it sit to gather feedback for a final draft update, I'll likely get to that next week. I'm currently consumed with getting F34b VM Images building smoothly.
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL final draft ready for review/merge.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
